In 'The Big Sleep' (1946), the screenplay was co-written by which Nobel Prize-winning novelist alongside Leigh Brackett and Jules Furthman?

a: You Can't Take It with You

q: In 'The Philadelphia Story' (1940), the character played by James Stewart works for which fictional tabloid magazine?

a: Real actors standing still in greasepaint
